title: சர்வார்த்த சிற்பசிந்தாமணி
content:
# சர்வார்த்த சிற்பசிந்தாமணி

Creator: s rajasekhar
Date: 2025-08-04T00:00:00Z
Downloads: 43
Subjects: Sarvartha Sirpa Chintamani, Shilpa Shastra, Tamil Architecture, Temple Sculpture, Hindu Iconography

Sarvartha Sirpa Chintamani is a rare and ancient Tamil treatise on temple architecture, sculpture, and iconography. It serves as a vital reference for the traditional Shilpa Shastra (science of sculpture) followed in South Indian temple construction. The text outlines guidelines for sculpting deities, vimanas, mandapas, measurements, proportions, and ritualistic significance. This work reflects the deep spiritual and technical knowledge of Tamil artisans and sthapathis (temple architects), preserving the sacred geometry and symbolism of Dravidian temple design.
